Our Story

Why Philadelphia Chooses Tavella Electric LLC

We are a trusted electrician proudly serving the Philadelphia community. Known for quality, reliability, and outstanding customer service — which is why our customers keep coming back and telling their friends.

With a 5.0-star rating from 131 verified customers on Google, our reputation speaks for itself. Every client walks away satisfied — that's not a goal, it's our standard.
